title: dialegomai #1256
definition:
1) to think different things with one's self, mingle thought with thought
    1a) to ponder, revolve in mind
 2) to converse, discourse with one, argue, discuss
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to think different things with one's self, mingle thought with thought
    1a) to ponder, revolve in mind
 2) to converse, discourse with one, argue, discuss

    NASB:  to discuss, to address, to preach:
